This historic hotel in Bamberg town centre offers rooms with colourful dÃ©cor, free Wi-Fi, and a modern, flat-screen TV. Parking is possible in the nearby area at a surcharge.

Combining Franconian and Mediterranean design, the Hotel Wohnbar lies in a quiet side street. Each of its rooms and suites has its own style.

An optional, varied breakfast buffets is available at the Wohnbar. A fine range of coffees are served in the hotel cafÃ© and lounge.

Guests staying at the Hotel Wohnbar can easily walk to the scenic Little Venice district and the Old Town Hall.
